column1: Ron’s collection of coins was valuable as he (to collect) them since he was a schoolboy.
When Sam returned home we (to watch) that TV programme for a quarter of an hour already.
Bill’s coat and mittens were wet because he (to play) snowballs with his friends in the yard.
David was irritated because the police inspector (to ask) him questions for more than an hour.
She (to work) as a shop-assistant for ten years in this shop.
Anthony (wait) for his airplane for 3 hours when its delay was announced.
I (to have) breakfast before I went to school.
He went to meet his friends after he (to do) his homework.
Alice was late because she (to miss) the bus.
She went to the post-office after she (to write) the letter.
He (to work) at the factory before he entered the college.
